functions.title: Guide Book #118
functions.author: Forsaken Odyssey
pages:
§7Guide Book #118§r
§lEquipment Effects§r
§8MISCELLANEOUS§r
 
•Water Aspect
•Magical Scourge
•Spirit Piercer
•Earth Bane
•Scatter Blink

§lWater Aspect§r
§8WEAPON EFFECT§r
 
•Weapons with this effect deal an extra 2 damage per level to fire-elemental-type mobs and mobs that take damage in water, and can also extinguish fire on mobs.
 
The following items have these effects:

§lMagical Scourge§r
§8WEAPON EFFECT§r
 
•Weapons with this effect deal an extra 2 damage per level to magical-type mobs.
 
The following items have these effects:
•§lPowder Staff§r
•§lCurserer Staff§r
•§lArcane Staff§r

§lSpirit Piercer§r
§8WEAPON EFFECT§r
 
•Weapons with this effect can damage spirit-type mobs with physical immunity.
 
The following items have these effects:
•§lBone Dagger§r
•§lPowder Staff§r
•§lCurserer Staff§r

§lEarth Bane§r
§8WEAPON EFFECT§r
 
•Weapons with this effect deal an extra 2 damage per level to earth-elemental-type mobs.
 
The following items have these effects:
•§lPiglin War Hammer§r

§lScatter Blink§r
§8WEAPON EFFECT§r
 
•Weapons with this effect can teleport the target mob to a random location within a 16-block radius of its original position.
 
The following items have these effects:
•§lTeleportation Staff§r
